# MLB Ballparks Quest — UX/UI Audit Report

> **Date:** 2026-03-18
> **Auditor:** Senior UX/UI Design Analysis
> **Version audited:** Tracker index.html + Scorekeeper scorekeeper.html
> **Surfaces reviewed:** Static tracker page, standalone scoring page, theme system
> **Method:** Full source-level component analysis (every HTML, CSS, JS section)

---

## Current Sitemap Structure

```
MLB Ballparks Quest
├── [Page 1] Tracker (index.html) ←── PRIMARY SURFACE
│   ├── Hero with route planning CTA
│   ├── Progress board (visited / remaining counts)
│   ├── Route preview (top 3 next targets)
│   ├── Highlights (recently visited parks)
│   ├── Park directory (search, filter, sort)
│   ├── Park detail panel (sticky sidebar)
│   ├── Scorekeeper handoff button
│   └── Roadmap section
│
├── [Page 2] Scorekeeper (scorekeeper.html) ←── STANDALONE SCORING
│   ├── Import card (tracker venue context)
│   ├── Games library (create, select, delete)
│   ├── Game setup (teams, venue, innings)
│   ├── Lineup editor (2 × 9-player grids)
│   ├── Play input grid (13 event types)
│   ├── Base state diamond
│   ├── Score table (auto-derived by inning)
│   ├── Play log (reverse chronological)
│   ├── Game notes
│   ├── Toolbar (undo, finalize, export, reset)
│   └── Status chips (inning, batter, venue)
│
├── [Shared] Theme system
│   ├── theme-tokens.css (5 team palettes)
│   ├── theme-switcher.js (runtime switch)
│   └── theme-switcher-ui.js (picker panel)
│
└── [Handoff] Tracker → Scorekeeper (localStorage)
```

---

## Main Conversion Goal

**Get users from park discovery → game day scoring → logged visit as fast as possible.**

The critical conversion funnel is:

```
Browse parks → Pick next target → Open scorekeeper with venue → Score game → Export record
```

---

## Three Most Important Workflows

### 1. Park Discovery & Route Planning (the browse loop)
```
Search/filter parks → Select park card → Review detail panel → Plan route
```
**Frequency:** Every planning session
**Current steps:** 2-3 interactions
**Pain:** No way to mark a park as visited from the tracker; state is hardcoded

### 2. Game Scoring (the scoring loop)
```
Open scorekeeper → Set teams → Fill lineups → Log plays → View score → Export
```
**Frequency:** Every game day
**Current steps:** 15-30+ interactions per game
**Pain:** No toast feedback on any action; reset button has no confirmation

### 3. Tracker → Scorekeeper Handoff (the bridge)
```
Click "Open scorekeeper with this park" → Venue auto-imported → Use imported venue
```
**Frequency:** Once per game day
**Pain:** One-way handoff; no way to return to tracker with scorekeeper data

---

## Top Usability Findings (Ranked by Severity)

### S1 — Critical (blocks or degrades core workflow)

| # | Finding | Impact | Location |
|---|---------|--------|----------|
| 1 | **Reset button has no confirmation dialog** | Single click wipes entire game — accidental data loss | scorekeeper.html:1544-1548 |
| 2 | **No toast/notification system exists** | Export, import, save, and error actions produce zero user-facing feedback | All actions across both pages |
| 3 | **JSON import has no schema validation** | Invalid file structure silently creates broken game via replayGame() | scorekeeper.html:1533-1541 |
| 4 | **localStorage failures are console-only** | Storage full or quota exceeded — user loses progress with no visible error | scorekeeper.html:1137-1143, index.html:790-794 |

### S2 — High (degrades efficiency or trust)

| # | Finding | Impact | Location |
|---|---------|--------|----------|
| 5 | **No way to mark parks as visited from tracker** | Visit status hardcoded in PARKS array; user can't update without editing source | index.html:678-709 |
| 6 | **Highlights section has no empty state** | When 0 parks visited, section renders nothing — no "visit your first park" guidance | index.html:874-889 |
| 7 | **Imported venue persists across new games** | Creating a new game after importing a park carries stale venue context | scorekeeper.html — createNewGame() doesn't clear import |
| 8 | **Play log doesn't auto-scroll to latest play** | Log is reverse-sorted but doesn't scroll to top on new play; user must manually scroll | scorekeeper.html — render() |
| 9 | **Route preview shows "Visited" for completed targets** | NEXT_TARGETS hardcoded to [22, 19, 14]; visited parks still shown with "Visited" pill | index.html:718, 932 |
| 10 | **Game delete has no confirmation** | Remove button in games list triggers immediate delete with no undo | scorekeeper.html:1303 |

### S3 — Medium (cosmetic or secondary workflow)

| # | Finding | Impact | Location |
|---|---------|--------|----------|
| 11 | **No game title field** | Auto-generated "Away at Home" makes 5+ games indistinguishable in library | scorekeeper.html — getGameLabel() |
| 12 | **Focus outline opacity may fail WCAG AA** | `rgba(161,44,33,.32)` (32% opacity) on light backgrounds | Both pages :focus-visible rules |
| 13 | **No keyboard shortcuts** | No Ctrl+Z for undo, no shortcuts for common actions | Neither page |
| 14 | **Tier colors hardcoded in JS, not theme tokens** | S/A/B/C tier pills may clash with alternate team themes | index.html:711-716 |
| 15 | **Lineups optional but unclear** | "Set both batting orders before first pitch" guidance but no enforcement; empty lineups auto-fill as "Away 1" etc. | scorekeeper.html:654-656 |

---

## Information Architecture Problems

### Problem 1: One-way handoff between tracker and scorekeeper
The tracker writes venue context to localStorage, and the scorekeeper reads it. But there's no return path — the scorekeeper can't write visit data back to the tracker. The user can score a game but can't mark the park as visited without editing hardcoded data.

### Problem 2: Flat library with no search or organization
The games library in the scorekeeper is a flat list with auto-generated titles. As the user accumulates 10+ games, finding a specific game requires scrolling through undifferentiated "Away at Home" labels with no search, filter, or date grouping.

### Problem 3: No persistent state indicators
Neither page shows when data was last saved, whether unsaved changes exist, or what the current session state is. The scorekeeper auto-saves silently; the tracker has no persistence at all (parks data is hardcoded).

---

## Recommended Interaction-Pattern Changes

### 1. Add toast notification system
Both pages need a minimal toast system for: export success, import success/failure, save confirmation, delete with undo, reset with confirmation, and storage error alerts.

### 2. Add confirmation for destructive actions
Reset button (scorekeeper) and Delete game button need `window.confirm()` or undo-toast pattern before executing.

### 3. Validate JSON import schema
Before `replayGame()`, check that the parsed object has expected shape (plays array, state object, lineups). Show inline error on schema mismatch.

### 4. Add "Mark as visited" to tracker
Park detail panel should have a "Mark as Visited" toggle that writes to localStorage and updates the filtered view. This decouples visit tracking from hardcoded data.

### 5. Dynamic route targets
Replace hardcoded NEXT_TARGETS with computed "next unvisited parks by priority score" so the route preview updates as parks are visited.

### 6. Auto-scroll play log
After each play, scroll the play log to the newest entry. Use `scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })`.

---

## Visual Design Notes

### Strengths
- Cohesive Phillies-flavored cream/red/navy palette
- Consistent card shadows, border-radius (18px), and pill components
- Responsive at 980px and 700px breakpoints
- Touch targets meet 44×44px minimum
- Theme system is well-architected (5 palettes, runtime switching, localStorage persistence)

### Opportunities
- Add subtle background texture or pattern to distinguish tracker from scorekeeper (currently identical aside from content)
- Score table could use alternating row tinting for readability
- Base state diamond could be larger on desktop for visual impact
- Add empty-state illustrations (not just text) for highlights, zero-play, and zero-game states

---

## Accessibility Summary

| Area | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| Skip link | Present | Both pages have skip-to-main |
| Semantic HTML | Good | Proper `<main>`, `<nav>`, `<section>` structure |
| Form labels | Good | All inputs have associated labels |
| ARIA attributes | Good | `aria-label`, `aria-labelledby`, `aria-live="polite"` on dynamic regions |
| Focus visible | Needs work | 32% opacity outline may not meet WCAG AA 3:1 contrast |
| Keyboard nav | Missing | No shortcuts; tab order works but no accelerators |
| Color contrast | Mostly good | Muted text passes; check accent on light backgrounds |
| Reduced motion | Not implemented | No `prefers-reduced-motion` support |

---

## Quick Wins vs Deeper Work

### Quick Wins (< 1 day each)

| # | Change | Effort | Impact |
|---|--------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Add confirmation to Reset and Delete buttons | 30 min | Prevents accidental data loss |
| 2 | Add toast notification system (both pages) | 2 hours | Feedback for all actions |
| 3 | Validate JSON import schema before replay | 1 hour | Prevents broken game state |
| 4 | Auto-scroll play log to latest entry | 15 min | Reduces scrolling friction |
| 5 | Add highlights empty state | 30 min | Better first-run experience |
| 6 | Clear imported venue on new game creation | 15 min | Prevents stale venue carryover |
| 7 | Add `prefers-reduced-motion` support | 30 min | Accessibility compliance |

### Medium Effort (1-3 days)

| # | Change | Effort | Impact |
|---|--------|--------|--------|
| 8 | Add "Mark as Visited" toggle in park detail | 1 day | Removes hardcoded visit state |
| 9 | Dynamic route targets (exclude visited) | 1 day | Route preview stays current |
| 10 | Add game title field to setup | 2 hours | Searchable game library |
| 11 | Increase focus outline contrast | 1 hour | WCAG AA compliance |
| 12 | Add keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Z, Ctrl+S) | 1 day | Power user accelerators |

### Deeper Work (1+ week)

| # | Change | Effort | Impact |
|---|--------|--------|--------|
| 13 | Two-way handoff (scorekeeper writes back visit data) | 3 days | Closes the tracker-scorer loop |
| 14 | Game library search/filter/sort | 2 days | Scales beyond 10 games |
| 15 | Connect theme-tokens.css (remove inline duplication) | 1 day | Single source of truth for themes |

---

## Files Audited

- `index.html` (1,031 lines) — Tracker page
- `scorekeeper.html` (1,580 lines) — Scoring page
- `theme-tokens.css` (144 lines) — Theme palette definitions
- `theme-switcher.js` (~60 lines) — Runtime theme engine
- `theme-switcher-ui.js` (~150 lines) — Theme picker UI

**Total codebase: ~2,965 lines**

---

*This audit covers structural, interaction, visual, and accessibility dimensions. All recommendations respect the static-hosting, zero-framework, local-first constraint.*
